title: The Zombie Zone
desc: Strange footsteps in the fog... is the swamp haunted? 🧟

q.en: Where do Dink, Josh, and Ruth Rose begin their adventure in this story?
q.zh: 丁克、乔什和露丝·罗丝在这一册里是从哪里开始他们的冒险的？

options.zh: 路易斯安那州的新奥尔良

options.en: Baton Rouge, Louisiana according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 路易斯安那州的巴吞鲁日（按书中另一种说法）
佛罗里达群岛
得克萨斯州的一个小镇

explain.en: The book opens in New Orleans, Louisiana, where Ruth Rose's grandmother is taking a painting course and has brought the kids along.
explain.zh: 故事开头在新奥尔良，露丝·罗丝的奶奶去那里上绘画课，并把孩子们一起带了去。

q.en: What three words are painted in red on the sign nailed to a tree trunk?
q.zh: 钉在树干上的那块牌子是用红漆写的哪三个词？

options.zh: 僵尸区 (ZOMBIE ZONE)
危险：有蛇

options.en: VOODOO TERRITORY according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 巫毒教领地（按书中另一种说法）
禁止入内

explain.en: After Dink trips, he sees a small sign nailed to a tree with three words painted in dripping red paint: ZOMBIE ZONE.
explain.zh: 丁克摔倒后，看到一块钉在树上的小牌子，上面用滴落的红漆写着三个词：僵尸区 (ZOMBIE ZONE)。

q.en: In the village cemetery, how many graves had been robbed that week?
q.zh: 在村子的墓地里，那一周有几座坟墓被盗挖？

options.zh: 一座
两座
五座
三座

explain.en: An old man tells Jack that two graves have been robbed that week, and people are afraid the zombies did it.
explain.zh: 一位老人告诉杰克，那一周有两座坟墓被盗挖，大家都害怕是僵尸干的。

q.en: Who is the guide who drives the kids into the bayou in his painted van?
q.zh: 开着画满图案的面包车、带孩子们走进湿地的向导是谁？

options.zh: 米尔娜，村子里的那位老太太
杰伊·弗里斯克，那位地产开发商
杰克，经营“鳄鱼向导”的那个人

options.en: Byron, the man in the woods
options.zh: 拜伦，住在树林里的那个人

explain.en: Jack drives a van painted with trees and an alligator with the words GATOR GUIDES spilling from its mouth, and he leads the kids into the bayou.
explain.zh: 杰克开的面包车上画着树木和一只鳄鱼，鳄鱼嘴里吐出“鳄鱼向导”几个字，是他带着孩子们走进湿地的。

q.en: Who lives alone in a junk-built cabin in the woods with an owl named Bill?
q.zh: 谁独自住在树林里用废料搭成的小屋里，还养了一只名叫比尔的猫头鹰？

options.zh: 露西，杰克的朋友
老人博
拜伦
杰克

explain.en: The kids follow giant footprints to a clearing and meet Byron, a big gentle man whose pet owl is named Bill.
explain.zh: 孩子们顺着巨大的脚印走到一片空地，遇见了拜伦——一个高大温和的男人，他的宠物猫头鹰叫比尔。

q.en: At night, what did the kids witness a dark figure doing at the cemetery?
q.zh: 夜里，孩子们亲眼看到那个黑影在墓地里做了什么？

options.en: Crawling out of a grave while searching for his lost wallet
options.zh: 从坟墓里爬出来，寻找自己丢失的钱包
挖一座全新的坟墓
扛走一口棺材

options.en: Painting the ZOMBIE ZONE sign according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 涂写“僵尸区”的牌子（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: They watch a tall figure pull himself out of an empty grave with a flashlight in his mouth; they later learn he was hunting for his lost wallet.
explain.zh: 他们看到一个高个子从空坟墓里爬出来，嘴里还叼着手电筒；后来才知道他是在找自己丢失的钱包。

q.en: What did Ruth Rose notice on Byron's shovel that made the kids suspicious?
q.zh: 露丝·罗丝在拜伦的铲子上发现了什么，让孩子们起了疑心？

options.zh: 猫头鹰的羽毛

options.en: Red clay matching the dirt at the cemetery
options.zh: 和墓地里的泥土一样的红黏土
牌子上的油漆

options.en: A torn piece of a wallet according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 一块撕破的钱包皮（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Ruth Rose spotted red clay caked on the shovel blade — the same red clay found at the graveyard, unlike the black soil of Byron's garden.
explain.zh: 露丝·罗丝发现铲子刃上沾着干硬的红黏土——和墓地里的红黏土一样，而不是拜伦菜园里那种黑色的土。

q.en: Whose leather wallet did Byron find in the dirt after the graves were dug up?
q.zh: 坟墓被挖开后，拜伦在泥土里捡到的皮钱包是谁的？

options.zh: 拜伦自己

options.en: Jack the guide according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 向导杰克（按书中另一种说法）
老人博
地产开发商杰伊·弗里斯克

explain.en: Byron saved the wallet for its owners; inside was a business card showing Jay Frisk, a land developer, with his photo on it.
explain.zh: 拜伦把钱包留着想还给失主；里面有一张名片，上面是地产开发商杰伊·弗里斯克，还印着他的照片。

q.en: Why did Jay Frisk and his partner dig up the graves?
q.zh: 杰伊·弗里斯克和他的同伙为什么要挖开那些坟墓？

options.zh: 为了建一座动物园

options.en: To scare the villagers into selling their land
options.zh: 为了吓唬村民，逼他们把土地卖出去
为了找一只走失的宠物

options.en: To steal gold buried with the dead according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 为了偷埋在死者身边的金子（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: Dink realizes Frisk dug up the graves to make villagers afraid of zombies so they would sell their land to developers who wanted to build apartments.
explain.zh: 丁克明白了，弗里斯克挖坟是想让村民害怕僵尸，从而把土地卖给想盖公寓的开发商。

q.en: What surprising thing did the mother alligator do with her newborn babies?
q.zh: 母短吻鳄对自己刚出生的小宝宝做了一件什么出人意料的事？

options.en: Pushed them into the water to swim
options.zh: 把它们推到水里让它们游

options.en: Left them on a log and walked away according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 把它们留在原木上然后走开（按书中另一种说法）
把它们吃掉了

options.en: Opened her mouth so the babies crawled inside to be protected
options.zh: 张开嘴，让小鳄鱼爬进嘴里受到保护

explain.en: Mama alligator flattened down and opened her jaws; the babies scrambled into her mouth, which is how alligators protect their young from predators.
explain.zh: 母鳄鱼趴平身子张开大嘴，小鳄鱼纷纷爬进她嘴里——鳄鱼就是这样保护幼崽不被天敌吃掉的。
